message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Gesundheit in Rheinland-Pfalz 2003","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4571","justification":"State health survey for Rhineland-Palatinate (Rheinland-Pfalz) in the 2000s including questions on medication use, treatments, and specific diseases/health conditions among the population of the federal state."},{"title":"Gesundheit in Rheinland-Pfalz 2010","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5969","justification":"Follow‑up health survey in Rhineland-Palatinate in the 2010s covering health status, chronic diseases, and utilization of medical treatment and medications among residents of the state."},{"title":"EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2004: Gesundheit (Deutschland)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4561","justification":"German EU-SILC health module from the 2000s with regional identifiers enabling analysis for Rhineland-Palatinate; includes long‑standing illness, chronic disease, and medical treatment/medication variables."},{"title":"EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2008: Gesundheit (Deutschland)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5300","justification":"German EU-SILC health module in the late 2000s including information on chronic conditions, limitations, and health care utilization; regional codes allow sub‑national analysis including Rhineland-Palatinate."},{"title":"EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2012: Gesundheit (Deutschland)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5670","justification":"EU-SILC health module in the early 2010s with variables on long‑term illness, specific conditions, and medical care; includes federal‑state identifiers to study Rhineland-Palatinate."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 2005 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4580","justification":"Large German health module in the mid‑2000s, containing questions on severe disability, chronic diseases, and medical treatment; regional variables permit analyses for Rhineland-Palatinate."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 2009 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5319","justification":"Health survey add‑on to the 2009 Microcensus, including specific illnesses and health‑care utilization; can be filtered for Rhineland-Palatinate using state identifiers."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 2013 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5685","justification":"2010s Microcensus health module; records chronic conditions, disability and health care usage (including medication and treatment) with the possibility to analyze Rhineland-Palatinate via regional codes."},{"title":"German Ageing Survey (DEAS) 2002","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3738","justification":"National ageing survey in the early 2000s with detailed information on chronic diseases, medical treatment, and medication of older adults; includes region variables so that Rhineland-Palatinate residents can be studied."},{"title":"German Ageing Survey (DEAS) 2011","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5243","justification":"2010s wave of the DEAS with extensive health measures, specific diagnosed diseases, and information on utilization of medical services and medications; sub‑national identifiers allow analysis for Rhineland-Palatinate."}]}
